message:
fix(stdlib): close clearenv vs setenv UAF on HOST_ENVIRON realloc

REVIEW round 3 (companion to 7c5b8200): clearenv() walked HOST_ENVIRON
without holding ENVIRON_LOCK to collect entry names. A concurrent
setenv that triggered host_passthrough_realloc could free the array
mid-walk — same UAF class as the native_getenv fix.

Wrap the snapshot walk in an ENVIRON_LOCK guard. The subsequent
unsetenv loop then re-acquires the lock per call (safe because the
lock is now reentrant), so no behavior change for callers.

Full abi suite: 2976/2976 pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
